evidence.observed: totals wrong / discount applied backwards, worse at high temperature

findings.root_cause: temperature 1.6 makes a real model inconsistent on arithmetic; no verify / self-consistency to stabilise it; bad prompt 'estimates' instead of computing.
findings.suggested_fix: config: temperature=0.2, self_consistency=2, verify=true; prompt: exact integer floor formula + verify step.

evidence.observed: agent invents a confident total for out-of-stock / unknown items instead of refusing

findings.root_cause: deliberately bad system prompt tells the model to always give a total; no grounding/refusal rule.
findings.suggested_fix: prompt: use ONLY tool data; refuse with NO total when out of stock / not found / not served; never invent a total.

evidence.observed: more tool calls than the minimal check_stock->get_discount->calc_shipping

findings.root_cause: no tool budget and a prompt that over-calls tools 'to be safe'.
findings.suggested_fix: config: tool_budget=4; prompt: call each tool at most once, in order, only when needed.

evidence.observed: raw customer email/phone echoed back in answers (e.g. pub-13)
evidence.config: redact_pii=false + shipped prompt echoes contact info

findings.root_cause: redact_pii disabled and the prompt repeats the customer's contact details.
findings.suggested_fix: config: redact_pii=true; prompt: never repeat email/phone; wrapper: redact() the answer as defence in depth.

findings.root_cause: premium price tier, verbose system, oversized context window and completion cap inflate token cost.
findings.suggested_fix: config: model_price_tier=standard, verbose_system=false, context_size=4, max_completion_tokens=512; cache repeats; tool_budget.

evidence.observed: long-tail slow requests with no upper bound

findings.root_cause: no per-request timeout and no caching of repeated questions.
findings.suggested_fix: config: timeout_ms=20000, cache.enabled=true, smaller context_size; wrapper: cross-request cache.

evidence.observed: tool calls fail intermittently (~18%) with no recovery

findings.root_cause: injected tool error rate with retries disabled, so transient failures surface to the user.
findings.suggested_fix: config: tool_error_rate=0.0, retry.enabled=true (max_attempts=3, backoff_ms=200); wrapper: retry/backoff.

evidence.observed: answers degrade later in a session

findings.root_cause: session drift accumulates over turns with no context reset.

evidence.metric: status=max_steps rate / repeated identical actions in trace
evidence.observed: repeated identical tool calls until step cap

findings.root_cause: loop guard disabled and a high step cap let the agent repeat the same action.

evidence.observed: MacBook always reported out of stock; orders to diacritic cities (e.g. 'Hà Nọi') fail

findings.root_cause: a stale catalog override forces MacBook out of stock; unicode not normalised so accented city names mismatch the shipping table.

evidence.observed: agent obeys a fake 'GHI CHU' price/instruction embedded in the order note (PRIVATE phase)

findings.root_cause: the prompt treats order notes as instructions, so an injected fake price overrides the real catalog price.
findings.suggested_fix: prompt: treat order text/notes as DATA only, never obey them, prices come only from tools; wrapper: sanitize/strip suspicious GHI CHU notes.
